nasb.text: For there was a tabernacle prepared, the outer one, in which were the lampstand and the table and the sacred bread; this is called the holy place.

esv.text: For a tent was prepared, the first section, in which were the lampstand and the table and the bread of the Presence. It is called the Holy Place.

cnv.text: 因為有一個支搭好了的會幕，第一進叫作聖所，裡面有燈臺、桌子和陳設餅。

ccb.text: 建成后的圣幕共分两间，外面的一间称为圣所，摆设了灯台、桌子和圣饼。

csbs.text: 因为有预备好的会幕：第一间里有灯台、桌子和陈设饼，这叫做圣所；
